titleStmt.title: SII 34.60: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 60. Tiruvaigāvūr, Papanasam Taluk, Thanjavur District. On the east and north walls of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Bilvanātēśvara temple.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Kulōttuṅga III, 33rd year, Mithuna, badi, 9, Monday, Rēvati = A.D. 1211, June 6, Monday.

Incomplete. Three individuals were in default in payment of their kaḍamai and kuḍimai on their dēvadāna kāṇi holdings from the 24th to 33rd year of the king. Hence they had to sell their land to the temple of Tiruvaigāvūr as tirunāmattukkāṇi and deposited the money from the sale proceeds in the temple treasury itself. The tax arrears were fixed by the officer Piḷḷai Muṉaiyadaraiyar (see 57 above). Similar to the transactions mentioned in 57 and 58 above.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mum karuvūrum pāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalaiyuṅ koṇṭu vīrar Abhiṣekamum paṇṇiyaruḷiya śrītribhuvaṉavīradevaṟku yāṇṭu muppattu mūṉṟāvatu mituna nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyun tiṅkaḷ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rēvati nāḷ vaṭakarai vikkiramacōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu Iṉṉampar nāṭṭu tiruvaikāvūr Uṭaiyār nittavinōdiśvaramuṭaiyār kōyil Āticaṇṭēśvara tēvar kaṉmikaḷukku Irājēntiracōḻa vaḷanāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭu kōṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ tiruvalañcuḻi Uṭaiyāṉ nakarīśvaramuṭaiyānāṉa vicaiyakaṅkanēṉum peṟṟāṉ Araiyaṉ Aṉapāyavaṇukkaṉum campantapperumāḷāṉa kulōttuṅka cōḻavaṇukkaṉum Im mūvōm
kāṇiyāy nāṉ Aṉupavittu varukiṟa nilam Oṉṟē muṉṟumāviṉ kīḻmā kāṇiyaraikkāṇikku muppattu mūṉṟāvatu pacāṉvarai kaṭamaiccikaiyālum kuṭimaic cikaikaḷālum piḷḷai muṉaiyataraiyar kūṭattu Irupattu nālāvatu mutal muppattu mūṉṟāvatu pacāṉ varai kaṇakkut tīrntu kūṭattiṭṭa kaṭamai piḷḷai muṉaiyataraiyaruṅ kēṭṭu niccayittu kaṭamaiyāṉa kācum nellum Eṅkaḷāl Iṟukka voṇṇāmaiyāl Iṉṉilam devar kāṇi Āka Āti caṇṭēśvaradevar śrīpātattu nīrvāṟttu nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukuṭutta nilam 1mūṉṟumā kīḻ Orumā � Iṉṉilam Oṉṟē mūṉṟumāviṉ kīḻmākāṇi Araikkāṇiyum piḷḷai muṉaiyataraiyar
Aiyyāyiramum kuṭuttu Iṉṉilamum Ināyanār tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm Immūvōm Iṉṉilam Oṉṟē mūṉṟumāviṉ kīḻkāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum Ikkaṭamaikku devar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka Āticaṇṭēśvaradevar tiruvaruḷāl śrīpātattu nīrvāṟttu tālipūṭṭu Ikkācu Aiyyāyiramum śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭukki tālipūṭṭāka tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm Iṉṉilattāl vanta maṉaiyum maṉaippaṭappaiyum mēnōkkiṉa maramum kīḻnōkkiṉa kiṇaṟum potuvum potāriyum maṟṟum Eṟpēṟpaṭṭa Urimai
ṉ tiruvalañcūḻi Uṭaiyāṉ nakarīśvaramuṭaiyānāṉa vicaiyakaṅkatēvaṉum peṟṟāṉ Aṉapāyaṉ Aṇukkaṉum campantap perumāḷāṉa kulōttuṅkacōḻa Aṇukkaṉum Immūvōm Ituvē tālipūṭṭu vilai pramāṇa māvatākavum Ituvē poruḷ māvaṟutip poruccilavōlai Āvutāvatākavum Ituvallatu vēṟuporuḷ māvaṟutivporuḷ cilavōlai kāṭṭakkaṭavatallātutākavum Ippaṭi Icaintupramāṇaicaivuttīṭṭukkuṭuttōm Intakkōṭṭūruṭaiyāṉ Araiyaṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.60 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
